missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If they are a service center, they can either register or log in if already registered. After logging in, they reach their home area where they can enter damaged parts, update parts information, or send expiry-related notifications.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow service center users to enter damaged parts, update parts information, or send expiry-related notifications after logging in.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow car owners to select required parts and make a payment when choosing a service.
hallucinations.reason: There is no mention of selecting required parts and making payments in the source text for car owner activities.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow users to choose whether they are using the service center side or the car owner side.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is redundant as it is implied in the context of the source text.

final_assessment_policy: moderate: needs_review if extraction/rewriting failed, no rewritten requirements were produced, exact duplicate rewritten requirements were detected, or the LLM validator reports 6 or more total issues across missing requirements, hallucinations, duplicates, and ambiguities
